rulings.Case Title: BAYWOLF CONSTRUCTION, A CA. GENERAL PARTNERSHIP vs. BRUCE, STEVEN AN IND. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended Motion For Leave To File Amended X-Complaint
rulings.Rulings: DEFENDANT BRUCE, STEVEN AN IND. Amended Motion For Leave To File Amended X-Complaint -- transferred to Department 301 pursuant to Defendant Bruce' CCP 170.6 as to the Hon. RONALD E. QUIDACHAY. Hon. RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, Dept. 302 (pb)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Joinder In Defts'S Motion For An Orecer Dismissing The Entire Action
rulings.Rulings: DEFENDANT BRAYNIN, VERA Joinder In Defts'S Motion to Dismiss is C O N T I N U E D to June 3, 2003 per agreement of the parties. Hon. RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, Dept. 302

rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION For An Order Dismissing The Entire Action
rulings.Rulings: DEFENDANT CHERNOGUZ, VLADISLAV MOTION For An Order Dismissing The Entire Action is C O N T I N U E D to June 3, 2003 per agreement of the parties. Hon. RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, Dept. 302

DEFENDANT IBRAHIM, SALAH MOTION To Vacate Default -- C O N T I N U E D T O June 13, 2003 -- Both parties to lodge courtesy copies with the Court per Local Rule 8.5 with a cover letter confirming the new hearing date. Dept. 302, Hon. RONALD E. QUIDACHAY (AA)

rulings.Case Title: ALI KAMAREI et al VS. AETHER SYSTEMS, INC A DELAWARE CORPORATION et al
rulings.Rulings: DEFENDANT AETHER SYSTEMS, INC A DELAWARE CORPORATION DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT -- Sustain with leave to amend as to the 3rd Cause of Action to plead intangible interest as merged with or reflected in tangible. Sustain with leave to amend as the 5th Cause of Action to plead terms of contract. Overruled as to other causes of action. Hon. RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, Dept. 302 (pb)
